title: Depths Update
description: Backporting Caves & Cliffs. Deeper worlds with negative coordinates!
body:
[![Available on CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.3.1/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/depths-update)
[![Available on Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/depths-update)

# **⛏️ Depths Update**

**Depths Update** is an experimental, work-in progress mod that aims to backport features of the modern **Caves & Cliffs** updates into Minecraft 1.12.2.

## **🔑 Key Features**

### **Expanded World Depth**

The world generation bounds have been expanded, lowering the bedrock level to **y = -64**!

### **The Deepslate Layer & Ores**

Below Y=0, the world seamlessly transitions from standard Stone into **Deepslate**.

* Features Deepslate variations for all vanilla ores and Copper.
* Includes the full family of Deepslate building blocks including Slabs and Stairs.

### **Cave Biomes**

* **Lush Caves**
* **Dripstone Caves**

### **Amethyst Geodes and More...**

![Cave Biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lqhtjzOo/images/6e5fbaa7482e071e7212a9e44345139ddb77f950.png)
![Amethyst Geodes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lqhtjzOo/images/b73c2ad5cd4e6fe8101c8aeb72bfdb2e8e7e7003.png)

---

## **⚠️ Requirements**

* [**Cleanroom**](https://cleanroommc.com/)
* [**AssetMover**](https://modrinth.com/mod/assetmover) (Client-side only; Versions 1.0.0-a2 and up).

---

### Also check out [**Explosive Enhancement**](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement-1.12.2)!
